_comment: Builder harness checklist. The agent works one feature at a time and sets passes:true ONLY after verifying. Do not delete features to make this pass.
_humanGated: Four values require a human before production launch and cannot be created by the builder without fabricating data: (1) the real Cal.com event-type slug — set VITE_CAL_LINK in the Pages build env; (2) the Cloudflare Web Analytics beacon token — set VITE_CF_BEACON_TOKEN; (3) production secrets RESEND_API_KEY / RESEND_FROM and CRM_SHEET_ID / GOOGLE_SA_EMAIL / GOOGLE_SA_KEY; (4) the real founder identity — set VITE_FOUNDER_NAME (and optionally VITE_FOUNDER_CREDENTIAL) and drop a real headshot at public/founder.jpg (or set VITE_FOUNDER_PHOTO). The code is fully wired for all four and degrades gracefully (logs, no dead-ends, and the founder card simply does not render — never an invented person) when they are unset. IMPORTANT FIX (2026-06-19 build): the Cal.com booking embed NO LONGER ships a placeholder slug. When VITE_CAL_LINK is unset, BookingEmbed renders an honest 'booking opening shortly' fallback with a working mailto (HAS_CAL gate) instead of a broken/non-existent calendar — eliminating the recurring silent dead-end on the primary CTA. The live calendar appears automatically the moment a human supplies the real slug; no code change required. og.png is a real generated asset committed in public/.

features.title: Hero with managed-team value prop + 'Book a 20-min discovery call' as primary above-fold CTA
Managed-team (not-a-tool) positioning vs Fivetran made explicit
ICP named on-page (stage/stack/team size) + 'Not a fit if…' qualifier
Honest pre-launch trust layer (stack/partner badges, founding-cohort offer, founder credentials, security/SOC 2 posture); no fabricated customers, stats, or builder notes
Named founder card (photo + name + one-line credential) beside hero and scorecard-at-risk booking embeds; env-gated to VITE_FOUNDER_NAME so no invented person ever renders
Problem section: cost of 3am pages / silent data drift
How-It-Works 3-step: Audit -> Build -> Manage
Outcomes/benefits section
Three-rung offer + pricing anchors (Audit from $1.5k -> Build from $8k -> Retainer from $3.5k/mo) + timelines
FAQ handling 'vs building in-house' and 'vs Fivetran' objections
Cal.com inline React embed component (primary CTA target), slug via VITE_CAL_LINK
Interactive Pipeline Reliability Scorecard (secondary soft path), email-gated before results
Tiered scorecard results; high-pain (at-risk) tier shows embedded booking
Email capture (scorecard gate) with validation
Pages Function /api/lead accepts scorecard submissions (validates, 422 on bad email)
Lead + score written to Google Sheets CRM (graceful log fallback until secrets set)
Confirmation email triggered on capture (Resend), real implementation not a TODO
Funnel hands off to booking after capture (no 'check your inbox' dead-end)
Unified outcome-specific CTA (topbar/hero/mid/footer all point to Book a discovery call)
Cloudflare Web Analytics (env-gated beacon, no placeholder shipped) + first-party /api/event beacon on submit/booking conversion
Real title, meta description, OG + Twitter tags, JSON-LD, real og.png asset; no placeholder comments visible to visitors
Responsive down to mobile, keyboard-focusable (focus-visible rings, reduced-motion)

WCAG 2.2 AA contrast: CTA fills use --signal-deep (#0f7a37, ~5:1 white-on-green) and small green text uses --signal-text (#0c6e31, ~5.2:1 on white); decorative-only green retained for borders/icons/large hero accent
npm run build and typecheck pass clean
